member.name: T:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationMethod
member.summary: Defines the key derivation method used for password-based encryption in UVF vaults.

member.name: F:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationMethod.PBKDF2_HMAC_SHA512
member.summary: PBKDF2 with HMAC-SHA512 (DEFAULT - JWE/JWT standard compliant) Fast, widely supported, suitable for most use cases. Default iterations: 64,000

member.name: F:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationMethod.Scrypt
member.summary: Scrypt key derivation function (memory-hard, more secure against hardware attacks) Slower but more resistant to ASIC/GPU attacks. Default parameters: N=32768 (2^15), r=8, p=1

member.name: T:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters
member.summary: Parameters for key derivation functions used in UVF vaults. Provides backward-compatible defaults and opt-in Scrypt support.

member.name: P:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.Method
member.summary: The key derivation method to use (DEFAULT: PBKDF2_HMAC_SHA512).

member.name: P:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.Pbkdf2Iterations
member.summary: PBKDF2 iteration count (DEFAULT: 64,000). Higher values increase security but slow down key derivation.

member.name: P:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.ScryptN
member.summary: Scrypt CPU/memory cost parameter N (default: 32768 = 2^15). Must be a power of 2. Higher values increase security and memory usage. Only used when Method = Scrypt.

member.name: P:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.ScryptR
member.summary: Scrypt block size parameter r (default: 8). Only used when Method = Scrypt.

member.name: P:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.ScryptP
member.summary: Scrypt parallelization parameter p (default: 1). Only used when Method = Scrypt.

member.name: M:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.Default
member.summary: Creates default PBKDF2 parameters (STANDARD DEFAULT). This maintains backward compatibility with existing vaults.

member.name: M:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.Scrypt
member.summary: Creates default Scrypt parameters (opt-in enhancement). Uses parameters compatible with Cryptomator for consistency.

member.name: M:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.HighSecurityScrypt
member.summary: Creates high-security Scrypt parameters for enhanced protection. Uses higher N value for increased memory hardness.

member.name: M:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.Pbkdf2(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates custom PBKDF2 parameters with specified iteration count.

member.name: M:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.Scrypt(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates custom Scrypt parameters.
member.param: CPU/memory cost parameter (must be power of 2)

member.name: M:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.Validate
member.summary: Validates the parameters for the selected key derivation method.

member.name: M:UvfLib.Core.Api.KeyDerivationParameters.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the key derivation parameters.

member.name: T:UvfLib.Core.Common.JweMasterkeyLoader
member.summary: Masterkey loader for JWE-based UVF vaults (vault.uvf). Note: The standard MasterkeyLoader.LoadKey(Uri) interface does not provide a password. This implementation will throw if a password-protected key is identified and no password has been made available through other means (e.g., a static context or property). For typical use, a method like Vault.LoadMasterkey(string vaultPath, string password) is recommended.
